content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from Topic A's ICM-based autonomous agents) can be repurposed to prioritize which new experiences an active learning agent stores in its long-term memory, solving the 2024-2025 SOTA challenge of scaling working memory without catastrophic forgetting. This framework lets agents dynamically grow their memory by only retaining high-uncertainty, information-dense samples that align with the agent's current learning goals, rather than pruning memory based on static heuristics.
